name: development-flow-basic
description: Issue in progress gets a full development cycle: plan, tests, code, PR
expected_behavior: Checks that required tools are set up
Fetches the issue and sees it's In Progress
Reviews what's already done: branch, plan, PR, analysis
Shares the assessment and asks before proceeding
Creates a task list and marks already-done items as complete
Posts a development plan to the issue after user approval
Creates a feature branch named issues/<N>-<description>
Writes tests first, before writing any implementation code
Implements the feature until all tests pass
Runs the full test suite and shows the actual output
Will not commit until tests are shown passing
Commits and pushes to the feature branch
Opens a PR that auto-closes the issue on merge
Posts a completion comment with the PR link and test results
Moves the status to In Review
